scripts.comment: Phase 5 Refactoring Tools - Add these scripts to your package.json
scripts.phase5:setup: npm install --save-dev puppeteer jest-environment-jsdom @testing-library/react @testing-library/jest-dom gzip-size glob
scripts.test:refactoring: npm run test:integration && npm run test:performance && npm run test:compatibility
scripts.refactoring:status: echo 'Running refactoring status check...' && npm run benchmark && npm run analyze-bundle
scripts.refactoring:validate: npm run test:refactoring && npm run refactoring:status
scripts.refactoring:monitor: npm run benchmark -- --phase=all && npm run analyze-bundle -- --compare-phases
scripts.build:analyze: npm run build && npm run analyze-bundle
scripts.build:benchmark: npm run build && npm run benchmark
scripts.docs:generate: echo 'Generating comprehensive documentation...' && npm run benchmark && npm run analyze-bundle && echo 'Documentation available at ./bundle-analysis/bundle-report.html'
scripts.postinstall: echo '🎉 Phase 5 refactoring tools ready! Run npm run docs:generate for reports.'

devDependencies.comment: Add these to your existing devDependencies
